description:
Three near-identical implementations of "replace non-alphanum with dash, collapse dashes, trim":
- protocol/src/repository_scope.rs (canonical)
- daemon_git_helpers.rs:187 (sanitize_identifier_for_git, fallback "task")
- daemon_notifications.rs:1229 (sanitize_identifier_for_path, fallback "repo")

Solution: Make the canonical version in `protocol` accept an optional fallback parameter: `pub fn sanitize_identifier(value: &str, fallback: &str) -> String`. Delete the other two.
title: Centralize `sanitize_identifier` into single parameterized function
